name: Howard Harrison
ai_summary: Howard Harrison has six years of experience working with physical disabilities and high-functioning ADHD children, describing it as his passion. Located in Mesa, AZ with FT/PT availability, he resolves conflicts by separating children and involving supervisors, and believes his willingness to learn and eagerness to participate make him a great teacher.
